driver_package_first_attempt: nvidia-driver-580 (closed; failed RmInitAdapter 0x22:0x56:884 — GPU requires open modules)
install_steps: reboot (1st) — FAILED: RmInitAdapter error; GPU requires open modules
notes: Blackwell/RTX 50-series (PCI ID 10de:2f04) requires NVIDIA open kernel modules. Closed proprietary nvidia-driver-580 package installs but kernel module fails to init (RmInitAdapter 0x22:0x56:884). Solution: install nvidia-driver-580-open variant. ubu1 + ubu2 now provide 2-way GPU compute capacity; roadmap #6 backup GPU path unblocked.
